Package org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.platform

Class DiscoveryRequestCache

java.lang.Object
org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.platform.DiscoveryRequestCache
public final class DiscoveryRequestCache extends Object
Request-scoped deduplication cache for Discovery API results.

Uses HstRequestContext.setAttribute(java.lang.String, java.lang.Object) so attributes are shared across all sibling HST components in a single page render. HstRequest.setAttribute is namespace-scoped per component window and is NOT visible to siblings — making it unsuitable here.
